hero.headline: MUJ Online MBA in Marketing: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved Super/Dual specialization. 12 spec subjects in Sem 3-4. NAAC A+, NIRF #58.

sections.tldr: MUJ Online MBA in Marketing covers consumer behaviour, sales and distribution, retail marketing, e-marketing, and international marketing for professionals targeting brand management, marketing leadership, or digital growth roles. NAAC A+, NIRF #58 at Rs 1,53,000 upfront (15% off) or Rs 1,80,000. Super/Dual spec — pair Marketing with Digital Marketing or Analytics. Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (70% off). Best for marketing professionals targeting category management, brand management, or CMO track roles.

about.body:
Marketing is a core MBA specialization for professionals building careers in brand management, sales leadership, market research, and consumer marketing. The MUJ Online MBA in Marketing covers the full marketing management scope: consumer behaviour, sales and distribution strategy, retail marketing, marketing research, international marketing, and digital commerce.

MUJ's Super/Dual specialization structure gives Marketing students a meaningful advantage. Pairing Marketing with Digital Marketing creates a full-funnel marketing credential covering both strategy and execution. Pairing with Analytics and Data Science positions candidates for data-driven marketing and consumer insights roles. This flexibility is embedded at no additional cost and allows professionals to tailor their MBA to specific career targets.

The Coursera Plus bundle at Rs 3,999 gives Marketing students access to brand management, digital marketing, and growth marketing courses from University of Virginia and University of Michigan — global certifications that complement the MUJ curriculum.

Manipal University Jaipur Online is NAAC A+ accredited with NIRF #58 University ranking for 2025. EdifyEdu verifies accreditation data independently and does not receive commission from MUJ. Full programme overview at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Corporate strategy frameworks, competitive positioning, and strategic decision-making for marketing leaders.

sem3Subjects.name: Term Paper
sem3Subjects.description: Independent research paper applying marketing theory to a real-world brand or consumer challenge.

sem3Subjects.name: Sales and Distribution Management
sem3Subjects.description: Channel design, distributor management, sales force deployment, and territory planning for FMCG and B2B.

sem3Subjects.name: Consumer Behaviour
sem3Subjects.description: Buyer decision-making, attitude formation, perception, and psychological drivers of purchase behaviour.

sem3Subjects.name: Retail Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Retail format strategy, in-store marketing, visual merchandising, and shopper marketing fundamentals.

sem3Subjects.name: Marketing Research
sem3Subjects.description: Quantitative and qualitative research design, sampling, questionnaire design, and insights generation.

sem4Subjects.name: International Business Management
sem4Subjects.description: Cross-border market entry, trade strategies, and managing international marketing operations.

sem4Subjects.name: Project
sem4Subjects.description: Major dissertation applying marketing specialization learning to an original applied business study.

sem4Subjects.name: Services Marketing and CRM
sem4Subjects.description: Service quality frameworks, customer relationship management, loyalty programmes, and retention strategy.

sem4Subjects.name: Advertising Management and Sales Promotion
sem4Subjects.description: Campaign planning, media mix decisions, ATL and BTL strategy, and advertising effectiveness measurement.

sem4Subjects.name: e-Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Online marketing channels, website marketing, email campaigns, and performance measurement frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: International Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Global brand management, country-specific marketing adaptation, and international consumer research.

syllabus.note: Semester 1 and 2 subjects are shared across all MUJ Online MBA specializations. Full programme structure at /universities/manipal-university-jaipur-online/mba.

whoHires.body:
Marketing MBA graduates from Manipal University Jaipur Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** FMCG and consumer goods, Retail and e-commerce, Advertising and media, B2B services, Financial services marketing

**Entry-level roles:** Brand Executive, Marketing Analyst, Sales Officer, Market Research Analyst

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Brand Manager, Category Manager, Marketing Manager, Key Account Manager, Product Marketing Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Marketing, Chief Marketing Officer, Head of Growth, National Sales Director, Category Director

**Top hiring organisations:** Hindustan Unilever, ITC, P&G India, Nestle India, Marico, Amazon India, Flipkart, Reliance Retail, Dentsu India

skills.body:
The Marketing specialization builds skills that FMCG, retail, and digital marketing employers test at brand manager and marketing director levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Consumer Insights: qualitative and quantitative research design, focus group management, and shopper panel data analysis
- Brand Management: brand architecture, positioning, equity tracking, and portfolio strategy across SKU levels
- Sales and Distribution: trade channel design, distributor ROI analysis, secondary sales tracking, and territory sales management
- Campaign Management: integrated campaign planning, media buying, effectiveness measurement using awareness and conversion metrics

**Applied skills:**
- Retail and Category Marketing: planogram strategy, promotional mechanics, and category captain frameworks for modern trade
- Digital Commerce: e-marketing channel strategy, marketplace management, and D2C growth frameworks

**Soft skills:** Presenting brand performance data to senior leadership, managing agency relationships, building consensus across sales and trade marketing teams for joint business planning.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MUJ Online MBA Marketing against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Marketing and Sales Management:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000. Amity's Marketing and Sales spec covers B2B sales and channel management in depth. MUJ Marketing's Sem 3-4 covers consumer behaviour, retail marketing, and international marketing comprehensively. MUJ's lower fee (Rs 1,53,000 upfront) and Super/Dual spec option (can pair with Digital Marketing) are practical differentiators. Amity NIRF #22 is stronger for national brand hiring.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management:** NMIMS is NAAC A++ and NIRF Management #24 at Rs 1,96,000-2,20,000. NMIMS Marketing covers brand management and integrated marketing communications in more depth. NMIMS brand is stronger for FMCG senior marketing roles. MUJ's Rs 1,53,000 upfront fee, Coursera Plus, and dual specialization flexibility are cost-performance advantages.

**vs LPU Online MBA Marketing:** LPU is NAAC A++ at competitive fees with strong placement connections in Punjab and Haryana. LPU does not offer a Super/Dual specialization structure. MUJ's Coursera Plus access at Rs 3,999 and Manipal brand are advantages for candidates targeting national FMCG and retail roles.

fees.body:
The total program fee for the Manipal University Jaipur Online MBA in Marketing can be paid through 2 options:

**Option 1 — Semester-wise payment**: Rs 45,000 per semester, Rs 1,80,000 total across 4 semesters
**Option 2 — Full upfront payment (discounted)**: Rs 1,53,000 one-time (Rs 1,80,000 standard less 15 percent fee concession)

A one-time registration fee of Rs 500 applies at enrolment. MUJ does not charge separate exam fees per attempt, project evaluation fees, or admission processing fees beyond this.

For working professionals, MUJ offers a 24-month zero-cost EMI plan at approximately Rs 7,500 per month on the standard fee (Rs 6,375 per month on the discounted fee) through its NBFC lending partners.

**Scholarships available** (non-stackable — pick one based on eligibility):
- **Divyaang** (persons with disabilities): 20% discount with Divyaang certificate
- **Defence personnel**: 20% discount with Service/IC number
- **Manipal University Jaipur alumni** (UG or PG): 20% discount
- **Government employees**: 10% discount with Govt ID
- **Merit scholarship**: 10% discount for 80%+ marks in 10+2 or bachelor's

**Coursera Plus bundled access** (MUJ differentiator): Enrolled MUJ students get Coursera Plus at Rs 3,999 (standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent discount). This includes 10,000+ courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, Johns Hopkins, University of California Irvine, and other top global universities.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees and scholarships with Manipal University Jaipur each quarter. Please reconfirm current offers and eligibility with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The Manipal University Jaipur degree certificate carries the Manipal University Jaipur name, the MBA designation, and identifies the online learning mode per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The Marketing specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode identification on the certificate is standard for UGC-DEB approved programmes and equivalent in recognition to regular MBA degrees for employment, promotions, and further studies.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from MUJ Online MBA Marketing alumni. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Priyanka Malhotra
items.liked: Consumer behaviour and marketing research modules were directly applicable to my brand management role at an FMCG company
items.disliked: Influencer marketing and social commerce content was absent — increasingly important for brand managers in India
items.body: I paired Marketing with Digital Marketing as my dual specialization, which gave me a comprehensive credential for my brand + digital growth role. The consumer behaviour frameworks and marketing research methodology are the two modules I reference most in my current work. The Coursera Plus access gave me digital marketing certifications from University of Michigan at an affordable price. The Manipal brand was well recognised by my employer.

items.name: Rajesh Nair
items.liked: Sales and distribution management content covered FMCG channel dynamics at a practical level useful for my trade marketing role
items.disliked: The proctored exams required specific browser settings that were not clearly communicated — caused stress during the first exam
items.body: I work in trade marketing at an FMCG company. The channel management and retail marketing content was substantive and gave me vocabulary for conversations with distributors and retailers. Pairing with Analytics and Data Science gave me a data skills credential I am now using for shopper analytics. The MUJ degree was accepted by my company HR for the Senior Trade Marketing Manager promotion.

items.name: Neha Singh
items.liked: International marketing content was thorough and gave good frameworks for understanding global brand adaptation
items.disliked: Career services were not helpful for marketing roles. The job board had very few marketing positions and counsellors were not marketing-specialised
items.body: The academic content was solid. International marketing and advertising management were the two most useful subjects. My frustration was placement support — I expected some structured connection to FMCG or media companies, which the campus MBA would provide. Online students are largely on their own for job search. The Manipal brand did help in shortlisting at two FMCG companies, but the conversion required my own networking.

faqs.question: Can I choose dual specialization with the MUJ Online MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes. MUJ Online MBA uses a Super/Dual specialization model where you select 2 specializations from the 13 available. Marketing pairs well with Digital Marketing (for a full-funnel marketing profile), Analytics and Data Science (for consumer insights and data-driven marketing roles), or International Business (for brand roles at export-oriented companies). The dual specialization is included in the standard fee.

faqs.question: Is Coursera Plus access included in the MUJ MBA fee or charged separately?
faqs.answer: Coursera Plus is available to enrolled MUJ students at Rs 3,999 per year, discounted from the standard Rs 13,999 — a 70 percent reduction. It is not free but is significantly subsidised. For Marketing students, Coursera Plus gives access to digital marketing, brand management, and consumer research courses from University of Virginia, University of Michigan, and Johns Hopkins.

faqs.question: What scholarships are available for the MUJ Online MBA in Marketing?
faqs.answer: Five categories: 20% discount for Divyaang individuals, 20% for Defence personnel, 20% for MUJ alumni, 10% for Government employees, and 10% merit scholarship for 80%+ marks. These are non-stackable. Additionally, full upfront payment gets a 15% fee concession reducing the total from Rs 1,80,000 to Rs 1,53,000.

faqs.question: What salary can Marketing MBA graduates from MUJ expect?
faqs.answer: Brand managers and marketing managers with 3-5 years of experience and this MBA earn Rs 8-15 lakh at FMCG and consumer goods companies. Category managers at organised retail chains earn Rs 9-18 lakh. VP Marketing and CMO roles at mid-size consumer companies pay Rs 22-45 lakh. Outcomes depend heavily on company size, sector (FMCG vs D2C), and city.

faqs.question: Is the MUJ Marketing MBA suitable for digital marketing professionals?
faqs.answer: Yes, but pair it with Digital Marketing as your second specialization for the strongest credential. The Marketing spec covers consumer behaviour, retail marketing, and international marketing — strategic and traditional marketing. Digital Marketing spec covers SEO, social media, content marketing, and web analytics. The dual specialization gives a full traditional-plus-digital marketing profile that brand-side digital marketing roles value highly.

chooseIf: You are a marketing professional in FMCG, retail, or B2B sales targeting brand management, category management, or marketing leadership and want NAAC A+ credentials under Rs 1.8 lakh.
You want the Super/Dual spec advantage of pairing Marketing with Digital Marketing or Analytics for a differentiated marketing profile.
You value Coursera Plus access at Rs 3,999 to supplement your MBA with global brand management or digital marketing certifications.
consider: You are targeting senior marketing roles at Tier 1 FMCG companies where NMIMS or MICA carry stronger brand recognition among marketing hiring managers.
You need a purely digital marketing credential — a dedicated postgraduate certificate in digital marketing from MICA or ISB is more recognised for pure digital roles than a dual-spec MBA.
You need active placement support — MUJ online career services are limited and you will need to drive your own job search process.
